calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-01-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, July 31, 2008: Mercedes A. Gavin, counsel for plaintiff The John Stewart Company; Vince Alvarenga, property manager, appearearing on behalf of plaintiff; Jeremy Reyes, Esquire, by limited scope representation for defendant Latishea Huffman, who is also present

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed with the Court. See scanned document for settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 22 Rosa Parks, City and County of San Francisco, California, 94115. The August 4, 2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem James Stanton Bair, III, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
